home.headline: Learn marketing by analyzing companies that already grew.
home.subtitle: By Diego Guzmán · I build and analyze growing businesses.
home.description: Every week I pick a company, analyze its marketing with public data, and tell you what I'd do to grow it. What works, what doesn't, and where I'd start.

newsletter.title: How I'd grow...
newsletter.subtitle: Each edition analyzes a company in depth and proposes a growth plan based on public data. What's working, where the opportunities are, and where to start.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: How can I help?
contact.name: Your name
contact.success: Message sent. I'll get back to you soon.

intents.work: I want to work with you
intents.workContext: I've led marketing at startups, run agencies, and launched products. Tell me about your company and what you need.
intents.contentCollabContext: I write about growth and marketing. If you want to co-create something, tell me the idea.
intents.podcastCollabContext: Open to interesting conversations. What would we talk about?
intents.otherCollabContext: Tell me what you have in mind.
intents.articleQuestionContext: Which article and what's your question?

footer.tagline: Marketing you can apply to your business.
